scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api && npm run test:api
scripts.check:web: npm run typecheck:shared && npm run lint:webportal && npm run typecheck:webportal && npm run build:webportal
scripts.validate: npm run check:secrets && npm run lint:web && npm run typecheck:shared && npm run typecheck:webportal && npm run build:web && npm run build:api && npm run test:api && npm --prefix apps/webportal run test:forms && npm --prefix apps/webportal run test:auth && npm --prefix apps/webportal run test:admin && npm run test:operations
